title: Minimal safe change — date-string parser fix

sandbox.fix_description: Add a regex guard (^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}) that routes space-separated YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm input to the strict ISO formatter before the lenient DD-MM-YYYY parser (which mis-reads the year as the day and returns a garbage negative timestamp). Also removes the now-dead nested try/except. DD-MM-YYYY and ISO-8601 'T' paths are preserved.

flutter_extended.note: Optional extended example. The pml-flutter monorepo is NOT vendored into this repo, so pml-flutter-date-fix.patch is a documented reference fragment and is NOT git-apply-able here.
